acquisition method: using a label-free liquid chromatography–tandem mass spectrometry (LC–MS/MS) proteomics approach.
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin at 29 °C for 16 h.
fragmentation method: HCD-MSMS (resolution of 15,000) was used to fragment multiply-charged ions.
instrument: using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid quadrupole-ion trap-Orbitrap mass spectrometer.
ionization type: Positive ions were generated by electrospray.
labeling: using a label-free liquid chromatography–tandem mass spectrometry (LC–MS/MS) proteomics approach.
reduction reagent: 5 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) and alkylated in 10 mM iodoacetamide.
